description.LOCATION_EN: Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road

2024-11-22T06:21:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to watermain burst , all lanes of the section of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road (Yuen Long bound) between Pui To Road and Yan Ching Street are closed to all traffic. 
Besides, part of the lanes of the junction of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road and Pui To Road is also closed to all traffic.   Affected bus routes nos. 62X and A33X have been diverted.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-22T06:21:00.CONTENT_CN:
因水管爆裂，屯門鄉事會路(往元朗方向)介乎杯渡路與仁政街之間的一段全線現已封閉。
此外，屯門鄉事會路和杯渡路交界的部分行車線亦現已封閉。  受影響巴士第62X及A33X號線須改道行駛。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-22T06:36:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to watermain burst, all lanes of the section of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road (Yuen Long bound) between Pui To Road and Yan Ching Street are closed to all traffic. 
Besides, part of the lanes of the junction of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road and Pui To Road is also closed to all traffic.   Affected bus routes nos. 62X, A33X, K51 and K51A have been diverted.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-22T06:36:00.CONTENT_CN:
因水管爆裂，屯門鄉事會路(往元朗方向)介乎杯渡路與仁政街之間的一段全線現已封閉。
此外，屯門鄉事會路和杯渡路交界的部分行車線亦現已封閉。  受影響巴士第62X、A33X、K51及K51A號線須改道行駛。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-23T07:31:00.CONTENT_EN:
All lanes of the section of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road (Yuen Long bound) between Pui To Road and Yan Ching Street which was closed due to watermain burst is re-opened to all traffic. 
Besides, part of the lanes of the junction of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road and Pui To Road which as closed is also re-opened to all traffic.   Affected bus routes have resumed their original routeings.
2024-11-23T07:31:00.CONTENT_CN:
較早前因水管爆裂而封閉的屯門鄉事會路(往元朗方向)介乎杯渡路與仁政街之間的一段全線現已解封。
此外，較早前封閉的屯門鄉事會路和杯渡路交界的部分行車線亦現已解封。  受影響巴⼠路線現已恢復原有路線⾏駛。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: The 15th National Games Cross Boundary Road Cycling test event
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 第十五屆全運會跨境測試賽

2024-11-22T13:01:00.CONTENT_EN: The road cycling test event of the 15th National Games will be held on Sunday. On that day, there will have different arrangements of the cross-boundary services, public transport services serving Airport, Tung Chung and Hong Kong Disneyland（https://bit. ly/40UQnIU）. Among them, the Transport Department once again reminds public / tourists to pay special to:- (1) Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Bus (“Gold Bus”) services: in order to tally with the suspension of the Hong Kong Port of HZMB at 6:30 am. on 24 November 2024, the last departure of Gold Bus will depart from the Hong Kong Port at 7:30 am. at the latest. On the other hand, residents of Zhuhai and Macau who need to come to Hong Kong in the morning, especially those traveling to Hong Kong International Airport to take flights, please pay special attention to the last departure of Gold Bus from Macau and Zhuhai to Hong Kong, which will depart from Macau and Zhuhai ports at 8:30 am. The Macao and Zhuhai Ports will suspend services for passengers and vehicles inspection at 8 a. m. on that day; and (2) Airport bus “A” routes (to and from the airport) and “E” route s(to and from Tung Chung) services: Due to road closure arrangements, the journey time will be lengthen, and the en-route stop at Hong Kong port for “A” routes will be suspended during certain periods. Public who need to go to the Hong Kong Port during the relevant period should consider using the B4, B5 or B6 routes from the airport, Sunny Bay or Tung Chung. We appeal to cross boundary and local tourist to plan their journey as early as possible. Passengers traveling to and from the airport, Tung Chung and Disneyland should consider using rail services. Passengers using franchised buses are advised to allow sufficient time. Public can visit the Transport Department's website at www. td. gov. hk or the "HKeMobility" mobile application for the latest information. The Emergency Transport Coordination Center of the Transport Department will escalated to the highest level of Joint Steering Mode during the event. The department will work with major public transport operators, including the MTR Corporation Limited and franchised bus companies, to closely monitor the traffic and transport conditions on that day and make timely adjustments to services if necessary.
2024-11-22T13:01:00.CONTENT_CN: 第十五屆全國運動會公路自行車測試賽將於星期日舉行。當日，跨境、往來機場和東涌，以及迪士尼樂園的公共運輸服務均有不同安排（https://bit.ly/40UQnIU）。其中，運輸署再次提醒市民和旅客特別注意： （一）港珠澳大橋穿梭巴士（金巴）服務：為配合大橋香港口岸當日上午6時30分暫停服務，最後一班金巴最遲會於上午7時30分於香港口岸開出。另一方面，有需要在當日早上來港，尤其是前往香港國際機場乘搭航班的珠海及澳門居民，請特別留意由澳門及珠海前往香港的金巴尾班車，將於上午8時30分分別由澳門及珠海口岸開出。澳門口岸旅檢大樓及珠海口岸旅檢大樓將於當日上午8時暫停服務；及 （二）機場巴士A線（往來機場）及E線（往來東涌）服務：因應封路安排，行車時間會有所延長，而在特定時段A線巴士不會途經香港口岸。有關時段需要前往香港口岸的人士請考慮使用機場、欣澳或東涌開出的B4、B5或B6號線。 我們呼籲跨境及本地旅客，及早計劃行程。往來機場、東涌及迪士尼樂園的旅客應考慮使用鐵路服務。使用專營巴士的乘客，請預留足夠時間。大家可瀏覽運輸署網頁www.td.gov.hk或「香港出行易」流動應用程式，了解最新資訊。 運輸署緊急事故交通協調中心會在賽事期間提升至最高級別的聯合督導模式運作。署方會聯同主要公共運輸營辦商包括港鐵和專營巴士公司，密切監察當日的交通及運輸情況，並在有需要時及時調整服務。

2024-11-24T06:24:00.CONTENT_EN: The road cycling test event of the 15th National Games will be held today (24 November 2024). To facilitate with the test event, in terms of traffic, the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Port Passenger Clearance Building and Outbound Vehicle Clearance Plaza will be closed from 6:30 a. m. to 12:30 p. m. and temporary control measure will be implemented at the North Lantau Highway and Hong Kong Disneyland Resort road sections from 10.30 a. m. to 12.00 noon. The journey time on these affected road sections is expected to be increased by 30 minutes. Besides, both bounds of Shun Long Road will be closed from 6:30 am to 2:00 pm. During the road closure period, vehicles traveling to and from Shun Long Road must be diverted to Chek Lap Kok Island and the journey time is expected to increase by 10 minutes. In respect of public transport services, the last departure of Gold Bus will depart from Hong Kong Port at 7:30 am, the latest. Besides, in view of road closure arrangements, the journey time of airport bus “A” routes (to and from the airport) and “E” routes (to and from Tung Chung) services will be lengthen, and the en-route stop at Hong Kong port for “A” routes will be suspended during certain periods. Public who need to go to the Hong Kong Port during the relevant period should consider using the B4, B5 or B6 routes from the Airport, Sunny Bay or Tung Chung. We appeal to cross boundary and local tourist to plan their journey as early as possible. Passengers traveling to and from the airport, Tung Chung and Disneyland should consider using rail services. Passengers using franchised buses are advised to allow sufficient time. The exact time of re-opening of Hong Kong Port and the resumption of traffic on the affected road sections may vary subject to the progress of the race. Members of the public are also advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and TD's "HKeMobility" mobile application.
2024-11-24T06:24:00.CONTENT_CN: 第十五屆全國運動會跨境公路自行車測試賽會於今日（11月24日）舉行。為配合測試賽，交通方面，港珠澳大橋香港口岸旅檢大樓及出境車輛通關廣場會於上午6時30分至下午12時30分關閉，北大嶼山公路及香港迪士尼樂園度假區賽道路段將於大約上午10時30分至中午12時期間實施臨時交通管制措施，受影響路段的行車時間預計增加30分鐘。而順朗路來回方向會於上午6時30分至下午2時封閉，封路期間經順朗路來回方向的車輛需改經赤鱲角島，行車時間預計增加10分鐘。 公共運輸服務方面，最後一班金巴最遲在上午7時30分由香港口岸開出，此外，機場巴士A線（往來機場）及E線（往來東涌）服務方面，因應封路安排，行車時間會有所延長，而在特定時段A線巴士不會途經香港口岸。有關時段需要前往香港口岸的人士可考慮使用機場、欣澳或東涌開出的B4、B5或B6號線。 運輸署呼籲跨境及本地旅客及早計劃行程。往來機場、東涌及迪士尼樂園的旅客應考慮使用鐵路服務。使用專營巴士的乘客，請預留足夠時間。香港口岸的具體重開時間及其他受影響路段的交通恢復時間會或因應賽事進程而更改，請市民留意電台、電視台或「香港出行易」流動應用程式發放的最新交通消息。

2024-11-24T12:49:00.CONTENT_EN:
The road cycling test event of the 15th National Games will be held today (24 November 2024). To facilitate with the test event, in terms of traffic, the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Port Passenger Clearance Building and Outbound Vehicle Clearance Plaza will be closed from 6:30 a. m. to 12:30 p. m. and temporary control measure will be implemented at the North Lantau Highway and Hong Kong Disneyland Resort road sections from 10.30 a. m. to 12.00 noon. The journey time on these affected road sections is expected to be increased by 30 minutes. Besides, both bounds of Shun Long Road will be closed from 6:30 am to 2:00 pm. During the road closure period, vehicles traveling to and from Shun Long Road must be diverted to Chek Lap Kok Island and the journey time is expected to increase by 10 minutes. 
In respect of public transport services, both bounds of Gold Bus has been resumed service at 1230pm. Besides, in view of road closure arrangements, the journey time of airport bus “A” routes (to and from the airport) and “E” routes (to and from Tung Chung) services will be lengthen, and the en-route stop at Hong Kong port for “A” routes will be suspended during certain periods. Public who need to go to the Hong Kong Port during the relevant period should consider using the B4, B5 or B6 routes from the Airport, Sunny Bay or Tung Chung. 

We appeal to cross boundary and local tourist to plan their journey as early as possible. Passengers traveling to and from the airport, Tung Chung and Disneyland should consider using rail services. Passengers using franchised buses are advised to allow sufficient time. The exact time of re-opening of Hong Kong Port and the resumption of traffic on the affected road sections may vary subject to the progress of the race. Members of the public are also advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and TD's "HKeMobility" mobile application.
2024-11-24T12:49:00.CONTENT_CN:
第十五屆全國運動會跨境公路自行車測試賽會於今日（11月24日）舉行。為配合測試賽，交通方面，港珠澳大橋香港口岸旅檢大樓及出境車輛通關廣場會於上午6時30分至下午12時30分關閉，北大嶼山公路及香港迪士尼樂園度假區賽道路段將於大約上午10時30分至中午12時期間實施臨時交通管制措施，受影響路段的行車時間預計增加30分鐘。而順朗路來回方向會於上午6時30分至下午2時封閉，封路期間經順朗路來回方向的車輛需改經赤鱲角島，行車時間預計增加10分鐘。

公共運輸服務方面，金巴港珠線及港澳線的服務已在下午12時30分恢復正常。此外，機場巴士A線（往來機場）及E線（往來東涌）服務方面，因應封路安排，行車時間會有所延長，而在特定時段A線巴士不會途經香港口岸。有關時段需要前往香港口岸的人士可考慮使用機場、欣澳或東涌開出的B4、B5或B6號線。

運輸署呼籲跨境及本地旅客及早計劃行程。往來機場、東涌及迪士尼樂園的旅客應考慮使用鐵路服務。使用專營巴士的乘客，請預留足夠時間。香港口岸的具體重開時間及其他受影響路段的交通恢復時間會或因應賽事進程而更改，請市民留意電台、電視台或「香港出行易」流動應用程式發放的最新交通消息。

2024-11-24T13:18:00.CONTENT_EN: The road sections which were temporarily closed due to the road cycling test event of the 15th National Games are re-opened to all traffic Besides, in respect of public transport services, services of Gold Bus, airport bus “A” routes (to and from the airport) and “E” routes (to and from Tung Chung) have gradually resumed normal. We appeal to cross boundary and local tourist to plan their journey as early as possible. Passengers traveling to and from the airport, Tung Chung and Disneyland should consider using rail services. Passengers using franchised buses are advised to allow sufficient time. Members of the public are also advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and TD's "HKeMobility" mobile application.
2024-11-24T13:18:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前受第十五屆全國運動會跨境公路自行車測試賽臨時封閉的道路現已解封。 此外，公共運輸服務方面，金巴港珠線及港澳線，機場巴士A線（往來機場）及E線（往來東涌）的服務已陸續回復正常。 運輸署呼籲跨境及本地旅客及早計劃行程。往來機場、東涌及迪士尼樂園的旅客應考慮使用鐵路服務。使用專營巴士的乘客，請預留足夠時間。 請市民留意電台、電視台或「香港出行易」流動應用程式發放的最新交通消息。

2024-11-24T13:34:00.CONTENT_EN: The road sections which were temporarily closed due to the road cycling test event of the 15th National Games are re-opened to all traffic Besides, in respect of public transport services, services of Gold Bus, airport bus “A” routes (to and from the airport) and “E” routes (to and from Tung Chung) have gradually resumed normal. Members of the public are also advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and TD's "HKeMobility" mobile application.
2024-11-24T13:34:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前受第十五屆全國運動會跨境公路自行車測試賽臨時封閉的道路現已解封。 此外，公共運輸服務方面，金巴港珠線及港澳線，機場巴士A線（往來機場）及E線（往來東涌）的服務已陸續回復正常。 請市民留意電台、電視台或「香港出行易」流動應用程式發放的最新交通消息。

Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queue on Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) ends at Lung Cheung Road near Hammer Hill Road. Traffic is congested now.

Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queue on Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) ends at Kwun Tong Road near Kowloon Bay MTR Station. Traffic is very congested now.
